SEARCH
Package org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service

Record Class OptionSourceExecutionRequest<E>

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.praxisplatform.uischema.options.service.OptionSourceExecutionRequest<E>
public record OptionSourceExecutionRequest<E>(Object hostContext, Object filterPayload, OptionSourceDescriptor descriptor, String search, List<LookupFilterRequest> filters, String sortKey, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable, Collection<Object> includeIds, Collection<Object> ids, OptionSourceExecutionContext context) extends Record
Validated execution request passed from Praxis to an option-source provider.

The request contains the effective public filter payload, structured filters, search term, sort key, includeIds or by-ids values, and the private execution context. For JPA fallback only, hostContext contains a JpaOptionSourceHostContext. External providers should depend on their own host context type or on OptionSourceExecutionContext.attributes().

Praxis validates request policy before provider resolution. Providers may rely on sortKey() and pageable() being governed by the descriptor, but should still avoid interpolating public values directly into backend-specific query languages.

      public OptionSourceExecutionRequest(Object hostContext, Object filterPayload, OptionSourceDescriptor descriptor, String search, List<LookupFilterRequest> filters, String sortKey, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable, Collection<Object> includeIds, Collection<Object> ids, OptionSourceExecutionContext context)
      Creates an instance of a OptionSourceExecutionRequest record class.
      Parameters:
      hostContext - the value for the hostContext record component
      filterPayload - the value for the filterPayload record component
      descriptor - the value for the descriptor record component
      search - the value for the search record component
      filters - the value for the filters record component
      sortKey - the value for the sortKey record component
      pageable - the value for the pageable record component
      includeIds - the value for the includeIds record component

    • requireHostContext

      public <T> T requireHostContext(Class<T> type)

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
